hero.description: India’s Silicon Valley offers a unique blend of technology, culture, and opportunity — shaping your university experience far beyond the classroom.

header.title: Bangalore —
header.description: The heart of innovation, startups, and global technology in Asia.

paragraphs: Bengaluru is the third-largest city in India and the nation’s undisputed technology capital. Home to the Indian headquarters of Google, Microsoft, Amazon, IBM, Infosys, Wipro, and hundreds of innovative startups, it is a city that runs on ideas and ambition.
The same innovation culture that built the global tech industry here permeates university campuses, co-working spaces, and coffee shops across the city.

For students studying computing, engineering, business, design, or media, there is arguably no better city in Asia. Industry proximity enables guest lectures, live projects, and internships integrated into academic programmes.
Beyond technology, Bengaluru offers gardens, restaurants, architecture, music venues, and a thriving arts and culture scene — making it an exciting place to live and work.

highlights.title: Industry Exposure
highlights.desc: Regular guest lectures and real-world collaboration with industry leaders.

highlights.title: Startup Ecosystem
highlights.desc: One of Asia’s most dynamic startup environments.

highlights.title: Cultural Lifestyle
highlights.desc: A vibrant mix of food, music, arts, and global experiences.

header.title: Career Opportunities in
header.description: From campus to global careers — powered by industry, international pathways, and real-world exposure.

intro: Studying at Presidency University is not just an investment in education — it is a launchpad for a global career. The university’s international academic architecture, combined with Bengaluru’s position as Asia’s leading technology hub, equips graduates to compete globally.
Industry proximity ensures direct exposure to employers, real-world projects, and career-ready skills built into the academic journey.

pathways.title: 3+1+1 Global Pathway
pathways.desc: Complete your final year and a full Master’s degree abroad with dual international qualifications.

pathways.title: International Internships
pathways.desc: Gain global work experience through exchange semesters and the IIPP programme.

pathways.title: Global Alumni Network
pathways.desc: Join a network of graduates working and studying across four continents.

outcomes: Opportunities across Europe, USA, and Asia

header.title: Cost of Living in
header.description: High quality of life at a fraction of global costs — ideal for international students.

intro: Bangalore offers an exceptional quality of life at a cost far lower than cities in Europe, North America, or other major Asian hubs. For international students, this means your budget stretches further without compromising on lifestyle or experience.

highlights.title: Easy Transport
highlights.desc: Metro, buses, and ride apps like Uber, Ola, and Rapido.

highlights.title: Shopping & Entertainment
highlights.desc: Malls, markets, cinemas, and vibrant nightlife.

highlights.title: Safe Environment
highlights.desc: One of India’s safer cities with secure campus facilities.

header.title: Around the World
header.description: Curated authentic local gallery and fine our street dishes.

header.title: Global Student
header.description: Our International Support team is dedicated to helping students from around the world feel at home. From application to graduation, we assist with visas, housing, academics, and adapting to campus life.
